name: Communication to EquationGroup C2 Tools
notes:
This rule detects communications to C2 servers.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Equation Group C2 Communication
SIGMA Description: Detects communication to C2 servers mentioned in the operational notes of the ShadowBroker leak of EquationGroup C2 tools


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 69.42.98.86, 89.185.234.145
TD_list: APPLY Communication to EquationGroup C2 Tools on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 69.42.98.86, 89.185.234.145
RED_list: Event name: Communication to EquationGroup C2 Tools
Event description: Detects communications to C2 servers.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
